ast_check.command: python3 -c 'import ast; ast.parse(...)' for all 5 source files
ast_check.detail: distill.py, embed.py, mcp_server.py, memory_db.py, web.py all OK

appliedUpdates.description: Added note about get_model() lacking caching and foreign_keys pragma not being set in get_conn() to architecture.md

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Update memory-worker skill example to mention that creating new test files for distinct features (e.g., tests/test_fact_embeddings.py) is acceptable, rather than always adding tests to existing files like test_memory_db.py.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature fact-embeddings-schema-and-persistence worker created tests/test_fact_embeddings.py with 11 tests instead of adding to test_memory_db.py. This was a reasonable organizational choice.

rejectedObservations.observation: Worker correctly followed the AGENTS.md convention of wrapping sentence-transformers imports in try/except with graceful degradation.
rejectedObservations.reason: Positive observation already documented in AGENTS.md under 'Graceful degradation' and in library/architecture.md under 'Key Patterns'. No action needed.
